if args.dry_run:
                db.session.rollback()
                logger.info("Dry run complete. No database changes were committed.")
                return 0

            db.session.commit()
            logger.info(
                "Updated %s (role=%s, experimental_features_enabled=%s).",
                target_email,
                desired_role,
                desired_experimental,
            )
            return 0
        except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
            db.session.rollback()
            logger.error("Database update failed: %s", exc, exc_info=True)
            return 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
